summary: Hardened critical-path.integration.test.ts: removed all skip guards (describeWithDb, isSuperTokensUp, try/catch swallowing), replaced vacuous toBeDefined() assertions with concrete state checks (order status, inventory balance, snapshot contents, payment fields), reordered Phase 3 after Phase 5/6 to avoid SuperTokens singleton DB closure, fixed pre-existing verifySession bug in middleware.ts (raw Fastify request → SuperTokens FastifyRequest wrapper), added comprehensive afterAll cleanup for Phase 5 and Phase 6 test fixtures
